testcase.classname: FetchError sets status on the instance
testcase.name: FetchError sets status on the instance

testcase.classname: FetchError sets statusText when provided
testcase.name: FetchError sets statusText when provided

testcase.classname: FetchError sets statusText to undefined when omitted
testcase.name: FetchError sets statusText to undefined when omitted

testcase.classname: FetchError sets body when provided
testcase.name: FetchError sets body when provided

testcase.classname: FetchError sets body to undefined when omitted
testcase.name: FetchError sets body to undefined when omitted

testcase.classname: FetchError sets name to "FetchError"
testcase.name: FetchError sets name to "FetchError"

testcase.classname: FetchError formats message as "status (statusText)" when statusText is present
testcase.name: FetchError formats message as "status (statusText)" when statusText is present

testcase.classname: FetchError formats message as the status code string when statusText is absent
testcase.name: FetchError formats message as the status code string when statusText is absent

testcase.classname: FetchError is an instance of Error
testcase.name: FetchError is an instance of Error

testcase.classname: MediaTrackerError sets the message
testcase.name: MediaTrackerError sets the message

testcase.classname: MediaTrackerError sets name to "MediaTrackerError"
testcase.name: MediaTrackerError sets name to "MediaTrackerError"

testcase.classname: MediaTrackerError is an instance of Error
testcase.name: MediaTrackerError is an instance of Error

testcase.classname: unwrapError returns { data: undefined, error: errorMessage } for a RequestError-shaped object
testcase.name: unwrapError returns { data: undefined, error: errorMessage } for a RequestError-shaped object

testcase.classname: unwrapError returns { data, error: undefined } for normal response data
testcase.name: unwrapError returns { data, error: undefined } for normal response data

testcase.classname: unwrapError returns { data, error: undefined } for a string value
testcase.name: unwrapError returns { data, error: undefined } for a string value

testcase.classname: unwrapError returns { data, error: undefined } for an array
testcase.name: unwrapError returns { data, error: undefined } for an array

testcase.classname: unwrapError distinguishes an object with "errorMessage" but without MediaTrackerError: true
testcase.name: unwrapError distinguishes an object with "errorMessage" but without MediaTrackerError: true

testcase.classname: unwrapError distinguishes an object with MediaTrackerError: true but missing errorMessage
testcase.name: unwrapError distinguishes an object with MediaTrackerError: true but missing errorMessage

testcase.classname: unwrapError handles null response as normal data
testcase.name: unwrapError handles null response as normal data

testcase.classname: errorHandler calls the wrapped function with the provided args and returns unwrapped data
testcase.name: errorHandler calls the wrapped function with the provided args and returns unwrapped data

testcase.classname: errorHandler propagates a RequestError from the inner function as an error string
testcase.name: errorHandler propagates a RequestError from the inner function as an error string

testcase.classname: errorHandler calls the wrapped function exactly once per invocation
testcase.name: errorHandler calls the wrapped function exactly once per invocation

testcase.classname: errorHandler passes undefined args when the wrapped function expects no parameters
testcase.name: errorHandler passes undefined args when the wrapped function expects no parameters
